name: K. Wah International Holdings Limited
summary: K. Wah International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property development and investment activities in Hong Kong and Mainland China. Its property portfolio comprises residential developments, office towers, hotels, serviced apartments, and commercial facilities. The company also provides property management services to residential buildings, commercial facilities, office towers, and real estate complexes. In addition, it offers financial, management, and decoration services. K. Wah International Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1990 and is headquartered in North Point, Hong Kong.
